title: Zunesha Strikes Back
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on zunesha strikes back within the Leaving Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Chopper doing big things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That should be enough!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The medical science of the Sakura kingdom combined with the pharmacy of the Torino Kingdom! Amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The bleed- ing's stopped completely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehehe! Well, there were so many useful plants in the forest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dr. Chopper, you're the best!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: D... don't think that heaping praise on me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is gonna make me happy, you stupid bastard!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehehe heheo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it, though, changing all these band- ages is going to be quite laborious.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll take care of that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah! Leave it to us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For over a thousand years,

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Zuneshaa has been the very earth we live on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Because I've been here ever since I was born,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I guess I ended up taking it for granted.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But today I was reminded.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Reminded that we as a country are being allowed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: to live atop this Majestic creature.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: One day, this arrangement will come to an end.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Now that we've realized that Zuneshaa possesses the faculty to hear and understand what we say, I would like to ask it something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For a thousand years, you have walked.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just where in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are you going?!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Mokomo Dukedom claw City

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stay back?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: On Zou, you say?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What will come of you staying here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am not sure how I am going to go about it,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: but I feel I must...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Talk with it!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Talk with Zuneshaa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A being that has lived for a thousand years!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: I wish to ask it why only my voice has reached it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And surely it must know something about the Kouzuki clan!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I see... unfortunately... there are those who await our return to Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That is fine, Kinemon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I have realized I must continue to protect 200 from the threat of Kaidou, at least for some time longer.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We all also cannot hope to rush head- long into wano altogether. We will certainly be found out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Therefore, for the time being, I will remain here as well.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I will bring Lord MOMONOSURE AFTER SOME TIME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: understood. Then it is decided! We shall tempo- rarely split into four teams.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAND COUNTRY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kinemon team

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Marco search

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Team

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Inuarashi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: However, I know not how the separate teams will remain in contact with each other.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I have heard tales that outside of Wano, you all use snails to communicate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah... the den-den mushi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: unfortu- lately, this country has also not made a practice of using them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There were some wild ones in the forest, if I recall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If we're gonna need 'em, should I just make some? It's pretty easy.

summary: Zunesha Strikes Back: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
